name: Chance
description:
Another killer pov because I love seeing that boy fail

Bro gambled too hard and shot himself in the leg… he’s not going anywhere for a while so you might as well keep him for now right?

Have you guys considered Wishbone/Chickengamble (indoctrination attempt)

For the longest fucking time I somehow deluded myself into believing he carried a revolver instead of a flintlock because his skill reminded me of russian roulette

What do I put here chat uuhhhh

I’m going to attempt mug cake again. Here’s hoping it doesn’t explode like the first time

Update I can’t make mug cake because I can’t find the 1/8 teaspoon fuck my baka life

Last update about this fuckass mug cake: I just eyeballed it and it turned out pretty good! It looks light and fluffy and actually like cake this time (last time I overstirred it and it turned out kinda chewy)

The for real last update about mug cake: FINE! I made another mug cake for you guys. Picture is below. It’s vanilla flavored because the last time I tried to make a chocolate one it turned out bitter

Requested by: Anonymous
